overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) depicting a greenhouse herbology classroom. Students sit at wooden potting tables surrounded by lush magical plants and flowers, with sunlight filtering through the glass roof. A student in green and yellow robes walks through the scene from right to left during the latter half of the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: herbology classroom greenhouse with long wooden potting tables

events.description: student in green and yellow house robes enters from the right side and walks across the greenhouse floor toward the left

agents.ego_description: sitting at a potting table in the foreground left, observing the greenhouse classroom and other students working

notable_agents.action: student wearing green and yellow robes walking from right to left across the stone floor, carrying a small plant or book

entered.detail: arched glass and metal framework ceiling allowing bright sunlight to filter through onto the plants below
long wooden tables arranged in rows with soil beds and various magical plants and flowers
potted plants suspended from chains attached to the greenhouse ceiling structure
clusters of vibrant purple flowers growing in the central table bed
cobblestone or paved stone tile flooring covering the greenhouse ground

segments.scene_description: The scene depicts a bright, sunlit greenhouse classroom with students seated at long wooden potting tables surrounded by dense vegetation and hanging plants. Sunlight filters through the arched glass roof, illuminating purple flowers and a large pumpkin on the central table. At around 18 seconds, a student in green and yellow robes enters from the right and walks across the stone floor toward the left, passing between the tables while other students remain seated and working.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a sunlit greenhouse classroom that remains focused on the bustling activity of a magical herbology lesson. It begins by capturing the bright atmosphere of the room, where sunlight filters through an arched glass roof to illuminate students seated at long wooden potting tables. The camera lingers on the dense vegetation and hanging plants, highlighting purple flowers and a large pumpkin resting on a central table. As the scene unfolds, the stillness is broken when a student in green and yellow robes enters from the right. The shot concludes as this student walks across the stone floor toward the left, passing between the tables while the other students continue their work.
